issues.title: [Epic] Terrain Reliability Hardening
issues.body:
## Goal
Improve reliability of terrain analysis and viewpoint generation across API, MCP, and web workflows.

## Scope
Stability, determinism, and project workflow alignment.

## Non-Goals
Major algorithmic redesign for this milestone.

## Milestones
2026-03 Terrain Reliability

## Risks
Provider limits and cross-service regressions.

## Acceptance Criteria
Core workflows execute without critical reliability regressions.

## Dependencies
API/MCP/web coordination and test coverage.

issues.title: [Feature] Deterministic project sync workflow
issues.body:
## Problem
Manual project updates are repetitive and inconsistent.

## Proposed Solution
Use project-plan.json + scripts/project-sync.sh for idempotent sync.

## API/UX Impact
No user-facing API change.

## Acceptance Criteria
Project sync script can run in doctor/apply modes reliably.

## Test Plan
Run doctor mode locally and validate generated cache and planned actions.

## Rollout Plan
Adopt for all new project planning runs in this repo.

issues.title: [Bug] Project field cache can drift after field changes
issues.body:
## Observed Behavior
Project field IDs are rediscovered ad hoc and may become inconsistent between runs.

## Expected Behavior
Field IDs are cached and refreshed deterministically before updates.

## Reproduction Steps
Run planning updates multiple times with manual field changes between runs.

## Root Cause Hypothesis
No canonical field cache refresh step.

## Fix Plan
Refresh field cache in script preflight and require cache presence for field edits.

## Verification
Check .git/project-field-cache.json for required keys after each run.

issues.title: [Docs] Project operations policy
issues.body:
## Audience
Engineers and agents managing GitHub planning operations.

## Gap
Current policy is spread across files and lacks deterministic runbook steps.

## Proposed Update
Document templates, label colors, estimate heuristics, and verification checklist.

## Reviewers
Maintainers of planning workflows.

## Completion Criteria
Policy docs and skill files reflect canonical process.
